2603.26944.title: Neuro-Symbolic Learning for Predictive Process Monitoring via Two-Stage Logic Tensor Networks with Rule Pruning
2603.26944.paper_summary: Predictive modeling on sequential event data is critical for fraud detection and healthcare monitoring. Existing data-driven approaches learn correlations from historical data but fail to incorporate domain-specific sequential constraints and logical rules governing event relationships, limiting accuracy and regulatory compliance. For example, healthcare procedures must follow specific sequences, and financial transactions must adhere to compliance rules. We present a neuro-symbolic approach integrating domain knowledge as differentiable logical constraints using Logic Networks (LTNs). We formalize control-flow, temporal, and payload knowledge using Linear Temporal Logic and first-order logic. Our key contribution is a two-stage optimization strategy addressing LTNs' tendency to satisfy logical formulas at the expense of predictive accuracy. The approach uses weighted axiom loss during pretraining to prioritize data learning, followed by rule pruning that retains only consistent, contributive axioms based on satisfaction dynamics. Evaluation on four real-world event logs shows that domain knowledge injection significantly improves predictive performance, with the two-stage optimization proving essential knowledge (without it, knowledge can severely degrade performance). The approach excels particularly in compliance-constrained scenarios with limited compliant training examples, achieving superior performance compared to purely data-driven baselines while ensuring adherence to domain constraints.
2603.26944.paper_summary_zh: 預測建模在序列事件數據上對於詐騙檢測和醫療監控至關重要。現有的數據驅動方法從歷史數據中學習相關性，但未能納入特定領域的序列約束和規範事件關係的邏輯規則，這限制了準確性和合規性。例如，醫療程序必須遵循特定的順序，而金融交易必須遵守合規規則。我們提出了一種神經符號方法，將領域知識作為可微分的邏輯約束整合，使用邏輯網絡（LTNs）。我們使用線性時間邏輯和一階邏輯形式化控制流、時間和有效載荷知識。我們的主要貢獻是一種兩階段優化策略，解決LTNs在滿足邏輯公式的同時犧牲預測準確性的傾向。該方法在預訓練期間使用加權公理損失來優先考慮數據學習，隨後進行規則修剪，只保留基於滿意度動態的一致且有貢獻的公理。對四個真實世界事件日誌的評估顯示，領域知識的注入顯著提高了預測性能，兩階段優化證明了知識的重要性（如果沒有它，知識可能會嚴重降低性能）。該方法在合規約束的場景中表現尤為出色，特別是在合規訓練樣本有限的情況下，與純數據驅動基準相比，實現了卓越的性能，同時確保遵守領域約束。
2603.26944.author: Fabrizio De Santis et.al.
2603.26944.authors: Fabrizio De Santis, Gyunam Park, Francesco Zanichelli
